extraction.one_line_summary: GEOGHEGAN HART attacked solo final climb at Pian Cavallo, won by 2 seconds over KELDERMAN with ALMEIDA limiting losses to 37 seconds to retain pink.
tactical_patterns: DENNIS attacked breakaway solo 46km out when peloton acceleration began, demonstrating precise timing awareness before final climb.
HINDLEY paced aggressively for KELDERMAN on final climb, revealing Sunweb's confidence in captain over co-leader despite equal GC.
SAMITIER bridged as sole second rider after initial ten-man break formed, showing willingness to burn domestique energy.
ALMEIDA isolated early on Pian Cavallo but limited losses to 37 seconds, revealing unusual resilience for U23 GC novice.

rider_signals.GEOGHEGAN HART Tao: positive: first Grand Tour stage win positions him within three minutes of podium with team now eyeing overall victory
rider_signals.DENNIS Rohan: positive: timed 46km solo attack precisely to peloton acceleration, showing tactical acumen despite eventual capture
rider_signals.HINDLEY Jai: positive: rode tempo on final climb for KELDERMAN rather than himself, confirming domestique role despite comparable GC position
rider_signals.KELDERMAN Wilco: positive: finished 2 seconds behind stage winner, now 15 seconds from pink with team fully committed to his leadership
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: positive: retained maglia rosa isolated on final climb, limiting losses to just 37 seconds shows exceptional maturity
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: negative: distanced on final climb well before GC contenders split, suggests fading form in second week
rider_signals.MAJKA Rafał: negative: lost contact on final climb, indicating Bora's GC ambitions weakening
rider_signals.KONRAD Patrick: negative: distanced on final climb alongside other domestiques, not protecting GC position
rider_signals.FUGLSANG Jakob: negative: dropped on final climb, confirming continued struggles after earlier race difficulties
rider_signals.VISCONTI Giovanni: neutral: won first KOM sprint to take virtual mountains jersey but dropped from late breakaway on final climb
